name: tinyfish-search
title: TinyFish Search
description: Search the web with TinyFish, open result URLs, and fetch clean page content.
author: pranav_janakiraman

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Web
commands.description: Search the web with TinyFish, browse result URLs, and fetch clean page content.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: TinyFish API Key
preferences.description: Your TinyFish API key. Create one at https://agent.tinyfish.ai/api-keys.

preferences.name: location
preferences.title: Location
preferences.description: Optional country code for geo-targeted results, for example US, GB, FR, or SG.

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Optional language code for result language, for example en, fr, de, or ja.
